name: partner-market-global
description: SEO and GAIO optimized B2B opportunity marketplace website for Partner Market Global.

scripts.lint: eslint app components lib i18n i18n.ts next.config.mjs postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev out
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=partner-market-global2 --branch=master
